story.iWant: controllers and DTOs updated to reflect clean design
story.soThat: the API is consistent with new model
story.tasks: 1. CreateUserDto: Remove @IsEnum(['admin', 'staff']) role validation 2. UpdateUserDto: Remove role field 3. UserController: Update all endpoints 4. Admin user management: Use UserRole for role operations 5. Swagger documentation updated 6. API responses: No role string field 7. Request/Response DTOs clean

acceptanceCriteria.ac: Admin user management: Use UserRole for role operations
API responses: No role string field

doc.title: Epic 16: Clean Relational Role Design
doc.snippet: Controllers and DTOs updated to reflect clean relational design without role string field

doc.title: User Prisma Model
doc.snippet: User model with ONLY userRoles relation, NO role string field

doc.title: RegisterDto
doc.snippet: Already has role field removed - used as reference

file.reason: Requires role field removal and validation update
Requires role field removal from response
All endpoints need updates for UserRole junction table
Service layer for user operations with UserRole

constraints.constraint: No role field in any User DTOs - use UserRole junction table
All API responses must exclude role string field
Role management via separate endpoints or UserRole operations
Swagger documentation must reflect clean design
Backward compatibility: existing API consumers must be notified

interface.name: CreateUserDto
UpdateUserDto
UserResDto

tests.standards: Jest unit tests with @nestjs/testing, controller testing with supertest

test.idea: User response DTO has no role field
Admin can manage roles via UserRole
